##RRUFFID=R060616
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=LiMn^2+^_4_Si_5_O_14_(OH)
##LOCALITY=Kombat mine, Kombat, Grootfontein District, Otjozondjupa Region, Namibia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Pink colored fragment of a single crystal associated with gypsum
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
